queries.question: Which genres are common to all writers?
queries.sql: SELECT Genres.name  from Writers_Genres join Genres on Writers_Genres.genreID = Genres.genreID join Writers on Writers_Genres.writerID = Writers.writerID   GROUP BY Writers_Genres.genreID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Writers_Genres.writerID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Writers)

queries.question: For every writer, show the genres that they write about.
queries.sql: select writers.fullname , genres.name from Writers_Genres join Genres on Writers_Genres.genreID = Genres.genreID join Writers on Writers_Genres.writerID = Writers.writerID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname ?name WHERE {
  ?writers_genres a :Writers_Genres .
  ?genres a :Genres .
  ?writers_genres p:hasGenres ?genres .
  ?writers a :Writers .
  ?writers_genres p:hasWriters ?writers .
  ?writers p:name ?fullname .
  ?genres p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the genres that each writer writes about.
